title: Golden Globes 2026 Winner Predictions In All Movie Categories
text: Screen Rant's predictions indicate that Sinners will win the Best Motion Picture - Drama category at the 2026 Golden Globes. The nominees in this category are: Frankenstein, Hamnet, It Was Just an Accident, Sentimental Value, Sinners, and The Secret Agent. According to the predictions, Hamnet and Sinners are the two strongest contenders here, with the various international films lurking as surprise picks. The article's reasoning for selecting Sinners emphasizes that this seems to be Sinners' category to lose at the Golden Globes. The film benefits from seven Golden Globe nominations overall and strong appreciation for director Ryan Coogler's vampire thriller. While Sentimental Value received eight nominations (the highest count), the analyst believes Sinners has superior momentum and should secure the drama category win.
